name: MSSQL Client MCP Server
what_it_does: MCP server providing SQL Server (MSSQL) database access to AI agents. Enables agents to execute T-SQL queries, inspect schema, query tables, stored procedures, and manage SQL Server databases — supporting AI-driven data analysis and database operations against Microsoft SQL Server instances.
use_cases: Querying SQL Server databases for data analysis from analytics agents
Inspecting MSSQL schema and table structures from development agents
Running T-SQL queries and stored procedures from DevOps and data engineering agents
Migrating or transforming SQL Server data via AI-assisted database workflows
not_for: PostgreSQL, MySQL, or other databases (SQL Server-specific)
Azure SQL Managed Instance with different auth patterns (may still work)
Production write operations without proper review (queries can modify data)
best_when: A developer or data analyst working with Microsoft SQL Server wants AI agents to query, inspect, and interact with MSSQL databases for analysis and development tasks.
avoid_when: You use PostgreSQL, MySQL, or other databases. Also: SQL Server can run expensive queries — set query timeouts for agent use.

auth.notes: SQL Server connection string with SQL auth (username/password) or Windows Integrated Authentication. Use read-only SQL users for agent connections.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Free — SQL Server Developer/Express editions are free
pricing.paid_tiers: SQL Server Standard/Enterprise licensing required for production
pricing.notes: SQL Server Express/Developer editions are free for development. MCP server is free open source. Production SQL Server requires licensing.

performance.rate_limits: Bounded by SQL Server connection pool and query complexity

known_agent_gotchas: T-SQL dialect differs from ANSI SQL — agents writing queries must use T-SQL syntax
Deadlocks common in SQL Server — implement retry logic for deadlock errors (error 1205)
Use read-only SQL login for agent access — prevents accidental DML operations
SQL Server query timeouts should be set — complex queries can run indefinitely
agent_readiness.security_notes: SQL Server credentials must be secured. Use read-only login for analytics agents. Database may contain sensitive business data. TLS to SQL Server recommended.

security_score_components.security_notes: SQL credentials must be secured. Use read-only user. Business data may be highly sensitive. TLS connection.
